nodes.name: Pick Account
nodes.notes: Per-store Tingstad credentials. Each wOrder order belongs to ONE location, so each run logs into ONE account. EDIT the accounts map: key by location_name (readable) or location_id (stable UUID). Passwords live ONLY here in n8n, never in wOrder/Supabase.

nodes.name: Get Login Page
nodes.notes: GET login page to receive any initial session cookie before posting credentials.

nodes.name: Login
nodes.notes: Form POST to /UserLogin/LoginUser (no anti-forgery token observed). Credentials come from the Pick Account node. fullResponse captures the auth Set-Cookie.

nodes.name: Build Items
nodes.notes: Fan out one item per product, each carrying the merged session cookie. amount = wOrder quantity (packages).

nodes.name: AddToCart
nodes.notes: Runs once per product. Adds it to the account's server-side cart. Article number alone is enough; productId/ticketId left blank (verified).

nodes.name: Summarize
nodes.notes: Collapse per-item AddToCart results into one summary for the webhook response.
